sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 41

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 41:1
items.html:
(to the question) Zecharim [males]
If the Partzuf receives the Lights from the upper one, and the Lights are received within it in all that completeness they had above, at the place of their exit in the upper one, then it is discerned as a male. (p. 758, Item 37)
